name: @clearline/data-access-settings
description: Settings data-access layer for clearline-web: a React Query hook over /api/settings/sections/:slug that surfaces the server's org-settings 403 as a typed error, so a settings section can degrade to access-denied independently of the client route guard (US-CW-033 AC-04). No UI, no business rules.

metadata.scope: Data-access lib for EPIC-CW-022 (US-CW-033 Settings Shell & Role-Scoped SettingsNav).
